---
title: ""
image: "../../images/py_kurs_cover01.webp"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
page-layout: full
---

<br>

::: {.d-flex .gap-2}
[Home](../../index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[Python Overview](../index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[1](./01basics1.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[2](./02basics2.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[3](./03basics3.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[4](./04basics4.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[5](./05pandas1.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[6](./06pandas2.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[7](./07Visualisations.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[8](./08WrapUp_Refresher.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[9](./09QA_SampleExam.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
:::

# Week 1: Python Basics I
*The foundation of your Python journey.*

::: {layout-ncol=1}
### (Introduction)
* **Introduction Presentation**

### (Fundamentals)
* [**Python Syntax**](https://www.w3schools.com/python/python_syntax.asp){.new-tab}
* [**Python Comments**](https://www.w3schools.com/python/python_comments.asp){.new-tab}
* [**Python Variables**](https://www.w3schools.com/python/python_variables.asp){.new-tab}
* [**Python Data Types**](https://www.w3schools.com/python/python_datatypes.asp){.new-tab}
* [**Python Numbers**](https://www.w3schools.com/python/python_numbers.asp){.new-tab}
* [**Python Casting**](https://www.w3schools.com/python/python_casting.asp){.new-tab}
* [**Python Strings**](https://www.w3schools.com/python/python_strings.asp){.new-tab}
* [**Python User Input**](https://www.w3schools.com/python/python_user_input.asp){.new-tab}

### (Project)
* [**Project 1: Band Name Generator**](https://stads-python-course.github.io/projects/project-1.html){.new-tab}
:::

<br>

### Material

::: {layout-ncol=1}
* [**Introductory Slides**](https://stads-python-course.github.io/assets/docs/introductory_slides.pdf){.new-tab}
:::

<br>

## Project 1: Band Name Generator

::: {.panel-tabset}

### The Task
Create a band name generator that processes user input.

1. Create a welcome message for your program.
2. Ask the user for the city where they grew up.
3. Ask the user for the name of their first pet.
4. Combine the city and pet names and show them their band name.

### Hint
# Project 1 Band Name Generator HINTS

1. Create a varibale named city and ask the user for an input.
2. Create a variable named pet and ask the user for an input.
3. Print the concatenation of both city and pet.

:::

## Resources

::: {layout-ncol=2}
[GitHub Repo](https://www.github.com/STADS-Mannheim/python-course-2025/tree/main){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-lg .w-100 target="_blank" .new-tab}

[w3schools Tutorial](https://www.w3schools.com/python/){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-lg .w-100 .new-tab}
:::
